---
name: Problem Solution Request
about: Propose a new LeetCode or DSA problem to solve and document.
title: 'feat(request): solve [LeetCode Number] - [Problem Name]'
labels: documentation, needs-review
assignees: Balaji0602
---

**Problem Description**
- LeetCode Number: e.g., 121
- Problem Name: e.g., Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
- Difficulty: Easy | Medium | Hard
- Problem Link: e.g., https://leetcode.com/problems/best-time-to-buy-and-sell-stock/

**Core Pattern (if known)**
e.g., Sliding Window, Two Pointers, Dynamic Programming.

**Why solve this problem?**
Explain why this problem is valuable (e.g., common interview question at Google, helps master a specific pattern, good follow-up to another problem).
